key_concepts: Tokenization as the foundational step of breaking text into discrete units.
Bag-of-Words (BoW) as a sparse, order-agnostic vector representation.
N-grams as a way to capture local word sequence and phrase context.

definitions.definition: Proses memecah teks utuh menjadi unit-unit kecil pembentuknya, seperti kata atau subkata.
Representasi teks yang menghitung kemunculan token tanpa memperhatikan urutannya.
Kombinasi n token berurutan dari sebuah teks untuk menangkap konteks lokal.

examples: Showing how a sentence is tokenized into words.
Comparing BoW representations of two sentences with similar words but different meanings.
Contrasting unigrams, bigrams, and trigrams for a short phrase to show how local context is preserved.

relations.builds_toward: TF-IDF in s02 and the shift to dense embeddings in s03.

exclusions: Subword tokenization mechanisms like BPE (too deep for this section, better introduced with LMs).
